productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone pointed loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this designed leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLoafer styled dress shoe for ease of useLeather upper with a diamond-textured design for absolute comfort and styleConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue to offer a customised FitSuede inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleSuede footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with palm frond grooves on the forefoot for grip on smooth surfacesTPR raised heel textured at the back foot region for absolute ergonomic comfortShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
